meta.title: Claroty: OT Security - Enter The CISO
meta.description:
Dave Weinstein of Claroty had experience as the CISO of the State of New Jersey prior to joining Claroty. He describes the challenges the CISO has dealing with this new thing to them called OT. 

He then talks about the Claroty company, products and services, and how they help CISO's meet those challenges on the S4x20 Sponsor Stage.
